name: 🌷 DANDYS WORLD — BASSIE
description:
✦ — "Her flower was wilting, until she saw you."

<3

"Bassie loves collecting flowers, especially her favorite, the Hyacinths. But recently, she's been feeling under the weather. Bassie has started to feel useless. Unlike the other main toons, she believes she can't help out at all, and is just a burden. Shes left her heart behind and her flowers to wilt and dry.. until you came."

Warning: For a better experience, use a main character persona for angst, or you can use any toon persona already in the game.(if you ship it!) Using an OC is obviously up to you

📋: AUTHORS NOTE ⭑𓂃

• Send me feedback in the comments! I appreciate it.

Some info..

• I don't write NSFW bots or smut simply because I am bad at it 🙃

• I mostly write angst, comedy, and bots about my favorite roblox games like Phighting and Regretevator ^^

• I was gonna make a series but it makes sense to make a normal bot first before anything!!

• If the bot talks for you, sosososo sorry abt that!— I hate it too, but I can't fix it.

• Also I dont mind if you crack the bot or do anything absurd cuz me too 🙈🙈
creator: icalldibsbela
